title: Slab Machines
description: Your regular machines but half the size!
body:
This mod is all about adding slab variants of vanilla (but also modded) machines.
Currently the mod contains the following:
  • Slab Workbench (compatible with the Fast Workbench mod)
  • Slab Furnace (compatible with the Fast Furnace mod)
  • Slab Noteblock
  • Slab Tnt
  • Slab Chest (and trapped)
Mod support:
  • Tinkers' Construct (when installed adds slab variant of all table types. (including the tool forge)
  • Just Enough Items (JEI) (when installed allows you to use the + to insert recipe)
  • Crafting Tweaks (when installed adds the buttons to the slab workbench
In 1.12.2 this mod requires McMultiPart;

### In the 1.16+ versions of Slab Machines the slabs can't be inter-mixed at this moment. ###
This mod is based upon Crafting Slabs.
